method: Manual research defaults updated by Codex. Static research layer; not a live data feed.

cloud-capex.note: Hyperscaler AI capex remains the master positive signal. Risk is rising scrutiny on ROI and the size of spending.

compute-chips.note: AI accelerator demand remains strong, but the obvious winners are priced for high execution.

memory-packaging.note: HBM and advanced packaging remain active bottlenecks. Watch for supply expansion and margin normalization.

power-cooling-grid.note: Physical infrastructure demand is strengthening as AI data centers need power, cooling, and grid equipment.

networking-optics.note: Cluster scaling supports networking and optics demand, but several names are crowded after large moves.

software-roi.note: Software ROI is the validation stage. Strong bookings at workflow leaders help justify AI capex; weak monetization would be an early warning.

HUBB.note: Clean grid/electrical exposure with less AI hype than cooling and optics. Watch utility orders and margins.

AMKR.note: Advanced packaging and test optionality. More upside optionality, but margins and capex discipline matter.

PWR.note: Strong backlog and infrastructure exposure, but quality is already recognized by the market.

NVT.note: Good electrical protection and liquid cooling exposure. More attractive on pullbacks after re-rating.

MOD.note: Direct cooling exposure, but capacity expansion and event risk make chasing less attractive.

COHR.note: AI datacenter optics demand is real, but expectations are higher after strong price action.

CRDO.note: High-speed connectivity thesis is strong, but valuation and customer concentration create chase risk.

NVDA.note: Still the strongest obvious AI compute winner, but decline risk rises if gross margin peaks or hyperscalers digest capacity.

MU.note: HBM demand is strong. Watch for memory pricing rollover or future oversupply.

ANET.note: AI Ethernet demand is strong, but cloud titan timing and valuation need discipline.

ZI.note: Part of software ROI stage, but needs proof of durable AI-driven GTM growth and retention.

MSFT.note: Capex and AI platform signal remain strong. Watch whether monetization keeps pace with infrastructure spend.
